entries.title: NatWest CEO Says AI Will Take Over Some Existing Banking Roles
entries.summary: NatWest CEO Paul Thwaite said artificial intelligence (AI) is going to change the bank’s workforce, though he didn’t say whether it would reduce the size, Finextra reported Friday (June 19). Speaking at a business summit hosted by The Times, Thwaite said, per the report: “In effect there will be roles that currently exist that absolutely to all intents and […] The post NatWest CEO Says AI Wi

entries.title: Soaring AI Costs Push Enterprise Buyers to Cheaper Chinese Models
entries.summary: Large artificial intelligence (AI) labs like Anthropic and OpenAI could see their growth impacted by AI users’ efforts to control costs, the Financial Times reported Thursday (June 18). Companies are looking to better manage their use of AI after seeing the costs of the technology rise, according to the report. The rising costs have been driven by the […] The post Soaring AI Costs Push Enter

entries.title: Instacart Reports Agentic AI Assistant Drives Bigger Grocery Orders
entries.summary: Instacart has begun rolling out an artificial intelligence (AI) assistant that puts together a grocery cart based on a conversation, the user’s selection of suggested prompts, or an uploaded photo of a grocery list. The company tested the AI assistant for months, is now rolling it out to millions of U.S. customers through its […] The post Instacart Reports Agentic AI Assistant Drives Bigger

entries.title: Eltropy expands agentic AI certification
entries.summary: Eltropy, the leading agentic AI platform for credit unions and community banks, is expanding access to its AI Certification program — opening free enrollment to credit union and community bank professionals, and deepening the program's reach through league partnerships and industry events.

entries.title: Healthcare AI Has Left the Lab. Now Comes the Hard Part.
entries.summary: Artificial intelligence in healthcare has evolved past a simple test-and-learn exercise. AI tools are now embedded into clinical scheduling, drug dispensing, patient communications and diagnostic decision-making across the industry, according to an analysis authored by Alaap Shah, a member of the firm and co-chair of Epstein Becker Green’s AI Cross-Practice Working Group. entries.title: Inside the Prediction Markets: Kalshi Hits $100B as Questions Keep Piling Up
entries.summary: Prediction markets spent the week facing a familiar mix of growth and resistance. A dispute over Polymarket’s Iran market reignited questions about how event contracts should be settled. A coalition of 56 organizations asked Congress to curb the industry’s expansion. entries.title: First Commerce Bank picks FIS core banking platform
entries.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial services technology, announced that First Commerce Bank, a $1.8B-asset community bank based in New Jersey, has selected FIS as its go-forward core banking platform – giving the institution a modern, AI-ready foundation as community banks of its size face mounting pressure to compete on technology with both national banks and digital-first challengers.

entries.title: Elavon expands all-in-one payments platform across North America
entries.summary: Elavon, a wholly owned subsidiary of U.S. Bank (NYSE: USB) and a global payments provider, announced the expansion of its All-In-One payments platform across North America to help businesses deliver more seamless commerce experiences in-store, on mobile and online.

entries.title: Franklin raises funds to bring agentic finance to e-commerce firms
entries.summary: Franklin, the finance platform built for e-commerce, today announced it has raised €1.6M (DKK 12M) in a seed round led by venture firm True Collective, alongside a number of prominent angel investors.

entries.title: Finastra sells UB core banking software unit to Pollen Street Capital
entries.summary: Finastra has sold its Universal Banking (UB) global core banking software business to UK-based private equity firm Pollen Street Capital. Financial terms of the deal were not disclosed.

entries.title: Danish startup Festina raises $25m for pensions platform
entries.summary: Festina Finance, a Denmark-based provider of cloud platforms for the pensions and financial planning industry, has secured €25m from its latest fundraising round.

entries.title: Deluxe makes $625M acquisition
entries.summary: The paper check company seeking to evolve its business is purchasing payments processor Celero to boost its non-check revenue.
